LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LEVEL 8 CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION IN ABATEMENT TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO CORRECT THE PLEADINGS AND DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO CONFORM TO THE FICTITIOUS BUSINESS NAME STATEMENT. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
